hero_subtitle: We offer you a look that suits you and reflects your style.
hero_title: A style that suits you, effortlessly
name: Full Name
booking_success: Your booking has been confirmed successfully.
thank_you: Thank you! Your booking was received successfully. Keep the code to verify or cancel your booking.
fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
time_already_booked: This time slot has just been booked. Please choose another time.
phone_already_booked_today: You already have a booking for this day using this phone number. Please contact the barber if you need to make changes.
selected_time_no_longer_available: The time you selected is no longer available. Please choose another time. The rest of your information is still saved.
pick_date_first: Choose a date first to view the available times.
day_blocked: This day is closed for bookings.
choose_another_day: Choose another day to view the available times.
no_hours: There are no available appointments on this day. Please choose another day.
no_internet_saved: Your information will not be erased. You can continue booking as soon as the connection returns.
slow_connection: The connection is a little slow. Please do not close the page while we check your booking.
checking_booking_result: The connection is slow. We are checking whether the booking was created to prevent a duplicate booking.
working_hours_load_failed_details: We did not display any unconfirmed appointments. Check your internet connection and try again.
times_load_failed_details: We did not display any unconfirmed times. Your information is still saved.
stale_working_hours: We are displaying the last working hours that loaded successfully. You can refresh them to confirm.
invalid_working_hours: Some working days have incomplete settings, so unconfirmed appointments will not be displayed on those days.
working_hours_update_error: A minor problem occurred while refreshing the working hours.
booking_result_unknown: We could not confirm the result yet. Your information is saved. Try again safely; a duplicate booking will not be created.
booking_failed_retry: We could not complete the booking right now. Your information is still saved. Please try again.
booking_offline_retry: The internet connection was lost during the booking. Your information is saved. Try again when the connection returns.
phone_blocked: This phone number is blocked from making bookings. Please contact the barber.
existing_booking_confirm: You already have a booking using this phone number. Do you want to add another booking?
request_id_conflict: The previous booking attempt could not be continued safely. Select the appointment again and try once more.
missing_fields_hint: Press Confirm Booking and we will show you which information is missing.
invalid_name: Please enter a valid name containing at least two letters.
invalid_phone: Please enter a valid mobile phone number.
not_found_message: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.
times_removed_success: The selected times were removed successfully.
time_restored_success: The time slot was restored successfully.
no_booking_found: No booking was found for this phone number.
code_required: Please enter the booking code to cancel the booking.
fix_errors_first: Please make sure all fields are filled in correctly.
booking_confirmed: Your Booking Has Been Confirmed Successfully
keep_code_hint: Keep this code to modify or cancel your booking later.
